hypothesis_testing_template.description: Use this template for every algorithm hypothesis test. Fill out ALL fields before running backtest.

hypothesis_statement.example: Skip DEC when opponent has low striking defense (<45%) AND high SApM (>4.0)
hypothesis_statement.validation: Must be specific and testable. No vague statements.

mechanism.example: Low StrDef + high SApM = opponent gets beaten up = unlikely to go distance = DEC unlikely to cash
mechanism.validation: Must explain why this should improve ROI, not just what changes.

expected_impact.validation: Quantified prediction with confidence level. No 'should help' or 'might work'.

example.gate_judgment: Gate would have cost 150u, doesn't make sense

sample_validation_fights.validation: Must show 3-5 recent fights where hypothesis applies. Evaluate if gate makes intuitive sense for each.

pass_threshold.validation: Specific number. Test either passes or fails this threshold, no ambiguity.

fail_threshold.validation: Revert decision point. If loss exceeds this, revert immediately without investigation.

PHASE_1_PreTest.phase_1_status: ✓ READY TO TEST or ❌ ISSUES FOUND

root_cause.example: Parlay P/L disappeared entirely. Gate may have affected parlay leg selection. Opponent durability stats don't reliably predict method outcomes.
root_cause.validation: Hypothesis for why test failed. Not just 'it didn't improve ROI'.

top_affected_fights.validation: Show specific fights where gate fired and what it cost/gained.

learnings.example: Opponent stats alone insufficient; need to weight against head movement, chin, loss_pct for better signal
learnings.validation: What did we learn that prevents re-testing this approach?

decision_options.action: Commit to main, increment version, update ALGORITHM_VERSIONING.md
Revert, log failure reason, archive to candidate list
Adjust parameters and re-test OR revert and mark for future research

prohibitions: No narration ('Let me check', 'Let me wait')
No polling loops (1 status check only)
